visualizerParams.title: Bitwise Addition Logic Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The bitwise addition function is resulting in an infinite loop or incorrect results. It seems the carry is not being calculated correctly. Find and fix the error.

solution.explanation: The carry in bitwise addition must be calculated using the `&` (AND) operator, which identify bits that are set in both numbers. The buggy code incorrectly used the `|` (OR) operator.
